0: Time to see what aetheric conversion's done to me hammer─an' what that'll do to yer phantom weapon!

2: Success! If ye'd asked me but moments ago, I'd have sworn ye couldn't achieve aetheric harmony as perfect as this...

3: Behold the frightenin' power o' the void made manifest: <SheetEn(Item,2,IntegerParameter(1),1,1)/>!

4: Behold the frightenin' power o' the void made manifest: <SheetEn(Item,2,IntegerParameter(1),1,1)/> an' <SheetEn(Item,2,IntegerParameter(2),1,1)/>!

5: See how that suits ye. 'Course, unless you put in the practice, even the finest arms'll feel like a lump o' scrap iron in yer hands.

6: In other words, ye've got to use the bleedin' thing. Swing it about, fell some fiends─do what ye do best, <If(PlayerParameter(4))>lass<Else/>lad</If>!
